attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS,
 (
 select  APPLICATION_ID ,AE_HEADER_ID ,REF_AE_HEADER_ID ,TEMP_LINE_NUM ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS
 minus
 select  APPLICATION_ID ,AE_HEADER_ID ,REF_AE_HEADER_ID ,TEMP_LINE_NUM ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.AE_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.AE_HEADER_ID and ACM.APPLICATION_ID=STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.APPLICATION_ID 
 and ACM.REF_AE_HEADER_ID=STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.REF_AE_HEADER_ID 
 and ACM.TEMP_LINE_NUM=STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.TEMP_LINE_NUM and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XLA_DISTRIBUTION_LINKS.REFRESH_DATETIME
